1.content: Alex has been working his ass off for weeks now. He had juggled homework, finals, and his minimum day job. He's finally earned himself a night of relaxation, and decides to pull out his old game collection from high school. Damn, he had forgotten how much he used to collect, he has games spanning from the early classics all the way to modern gaming. He grabs a few of his favorites, hooks up his systems, and plays for the entire night. It wasn't until the sunrise started to peer up that he decided to knock out and sleep for the night. He fell asleep immediatly, unaware of the adventure that was about to start for him.
1.title: A Relaxing Game Night

11.content:
Alex wakes up, a bit sore since he fell asleep in such an odd position, but he had gotten the best sleep of his life anyways. Although something had felt a little odd when he woke up, it seems like a lot of noise was happening around him. Had he left the window open when he fell asleep? He throws the covers off of him, and as soon as he does, he looks up in shock.

He is no longer in his room, in fact he's not sure where he is, but everything seems huge. He sits on his bed, which was tiny along with him, and analyzes his surrounding. It only takes him a moment to realize where he is. He's somehow physically in the game he had played last night, which would be amazing, had he not been shrunken to a tiny man as well. He played a lot of games last night, but he recognizes that this is the one he played right before he went to bed, which was...
11.title: A Journey Begins...

111.content: He recognizes this area from a Persona game, but which Persona game was he playing again last night?
111.title: Persona

1111.content: He was playing Persona 5 Royal last night, one of his all time favorite games, and now, he was seeing it from a whole new perspective. He has to try and contact someone, and going for someone he recongized was probably the best idea. Luckily, he ended up shrunk near the place of someone who would definitly recognize him
1111.title: Persona 5

choices: Alex climbs the table to get his attention
Uh oh, Iwai starts to move towards your direction
Someone new walks through the door behind you
11111.content:
From observing his surroundings, he found out he was in the quiet back alley of the Shibuya Shopping District, where the military enthusiast store, Untouchables, was ran by Munehisa Iwai. Alex remembered that in the game, Iwai was one of the confidants that provided weapons to the Phantom Theives. He seemed like a pretty intiminating guy, being an ex-Yakuza and all, but he was the only person close by who you at least kind of recognize.

Alex traverses away from his bed towards the quiet looking store and slips his tiny body under the door hinge. As he enters the shop, the smell of dust and leather take over his senses. Old replica military equipment hangs near the entrance, followed by model guns lining up the walls, even at a tiny size, Alex feels intimidated by the gear around him, but is thankful that the store seems pretty empty, until he sees Iwai himself sitting at the front counter

Alex looks up in awe at the giant man. When playing the game, he always thought Iwai looked like a silver fox, but now up-close and in person, especially at his giant size, he looked more like a god then a silver fox. Iwai is leaned back in his chair, big leather boots laid on top of the counter, it was a sight to see

Alex comes back to reality and tries to think of a way to contact him. Maybe he could climb the table and get his attention of there?
11111.title: Munehisa Iwai, The Greatest Gun Daddy

choices: Iwai moves his feet down, taking Alex with them
Iwai sees Alex on his boot
111111.content:
Alex makes his way to the corner of the table to start his climb. Luckily for him, the ends of the table are ridged, making it easy for him to climb up to the top. As Alex climbs up the table, he starts to get a sense of how small he really is. The ridges he's using to climb who be a simple design most would ignore, but it's really one of the only thing Alex can access at his size.

After what felt like hours of climbing, Alex reached the top of the desk, where he finally could clearly see the face of Iwai. He could see his sharp features, his unshaven face full of grey hairs, his piercing grey eyes invested in whatever he was reading. Alex couldn't help but admit that, damn, he was quiet attractive, especially at his giant size.

After his initial distraction, Alex starts to formulate a plan to contact Iwai. He could try and use his legs like a bridge, and get closer to his face and get his attention, or maybe Alex would get lucky and just be seen on the counter, either way, he has to figure out something soon.

Alex runs up to Iwai's boots, that he still has propped up on the counter. As he approaches them to make his next move, the smell of leather gets even more intense, clearly, Iwai's had these boots for a while. Alex uses a stray lace to climb up on top of the boot, feeling the warmth radiate from his foot through the boot. Alex stands near the area between the boot and Iwai's leg, ready to make the climb up.
111111.title: From Floor to Boot

choices: Alex's movement goes unnoticed and he ends up under the toes
Iwai feels movement on his foot and checks it out
Iwai starts to move quicker, putting Alex in danger
1111112.content:
As Alex started his journey up Iwai's leg, he failed to notice that Iwai had finished reading his magazine and was getting up to get a new one. He was bringing his legs down to the ground, taking Alex with them. Since Alex was just starting his walk up Iwai's leg, he was near the opening of his boot, so when Iwai brought his leg down, it caused Alex to go tumbling down into his boot.

As Iwai brought his legs down, Alex tumbled into the boot opening and slid down his leg, deep into his boot. He's sandwiched between the wall and his foot, which of course is sweaty, since Iwai is the type of person to not wear socks with his boots. The smell hits Alex intensely, if the leather smell was strong outside of the boot, it was even stronger here, and along with it was the smell of a million feet that just entered a gym locker room.

The heat was intense for Alex down here, and the smell was already making his head a bit dizzy. He has to alert Iwai someway, so he wiggles himself along the foot, hoping Iwai takes notice.
1111112.title: A Slip into Boot Town

112.content: He played one of the Fire Emblem games last night, one of his longtime favorites. They all sort of have the same theme, but he remembers he played his favorite one before he slept
112.title: Fire Emblem

113.content: He had played a fallout game last night, but they all sort of blend together, which one was it?
113.title: Fallout

114.content:
He has been playing the Uncharted games last night, he recognized the attic he was in, it was the home of Nathan Drake. It was filled to the brim with reminders of the adventures he had taken. Had Alex been normal sized, he would've had a field day checking out everything from his favorite game, but he had more important things to worry about right now.

Alex hears noises below him, the voices of people echoing through the house, he figures Nathan Drake and friends must be downstairs, if he can find a way out of this attic, he can try and get attention from at least one of them. Maybe they can somehow grow him back to normal size or get him back home.

Alex wouldn't have to try hard to find someone though, since he can hear someone opening the attic door. A large figure steps up from below and stands tall in the attic now. They go to flip on the lights and the figure is revealed to be...
114.title: Uncharted: A Tiny Treasure

info.brief_description: A long night of gaming ends with Alex somehow in the game, shrunken down to a tiny size
info.description:
Alex is a college student who has been swamped with homework and finals for the past few weeks. After finally getting a break for the night, he pulls out some old game consoles and plays some of his favorite games for the entire night. When he finally decides to go to sleep, he wakes up in one of the games he played. The only problem is, he has been shrunken down to a tiny size, and he now has to find a way to get help from the giant men of his gaming library, and to also survive against them.

RULES
1. No GTS

There are plenty of stories for giant women, so let's keep this story focused on the giant men only, it's ok if female characters are mentioned, but don't let them be the main focus

2. Keep all Characters 18+

If a character is the main focus, they have to be 18+, absolutely no kids. Use judgement if a character has an undefined age.

3. No short chapters

Unless it's a transition chapter (like picking a specific game in a series) try and keep chapters at a paragraph at least

Just follow these rules and write to your hearts content
